task.title: Mobile App Foundation
task.description: Create Expo React Native app with push notification support and basic screens

implementation.details:
1. Initialize Expo SDK 50+ project
2. Set up navigation with bottom tabs
3. Implement push notification registration
4. Create basic screens for notifications, settings
5. Add authentication flow with biometric support

task.acceptance_criteria: App builds and runs on simulator, push notifications register successfully, navigation works, authentication functional
